paragraph: Crayola Colored pencil in assorted colors provide smooth, scratch-free rich coloring. pencil with 3.3 mm core feature wood barrel nontoxic lead for safety usage, sold as 12 per box.
bullets: Full-length colored pencils
3.3 mm
AP Certified Non-toxic
Ideal for drawing methods requiring precise lines, greater detail and control of color
Versatile colors blend easily
Pre-sharpened, thick, soft leads for easy blending
AP Seal of Performance Safety
Set includes the following colors: yellow, orange, red orange, red, yellow green, green, sky blue, blue, violet, white, brown, and black
AP non-toxic
12-count box includes: red, orange, yellow, green, blue, violet, brown, black, red/orange, yellow/green, sky blue & light brown

Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Crayola Colored Pencils- Draw Detailed Pictures
expandedDescr:
With Crayola colored pencils, any artist, young or old, can create detailed images in vivid color. The fine tips and easy-flow leads provide smooth lines and rich coloring. With a few simple techniques, such as changing the pencil angle or altering drawing pressure, it's easy to create a variety of different textures and details for artwork that is uniquely yours.

Rich, Vibrant Colors
The 12-count box of Crayola colored pencils provides all the basic colors you need to create whatever images you can imagine. You can easily blend colors to create more variety, or you can upgrade to the 24-count box to choose from even more rich colors.

Presharpened for Immediate Use
The pencils come presharpened, so they are ready to use right out of the box. When they wear down, the smooth lead tips sharpen easily.

Convenient Packaging
Each set of Crayola colored pencils comes in a sturdy box that is perfect for storing the pencils. It keeps them safe and ready for use, so you don't have to worry about lost or broken pencils.

paragraph: Measure with precision by using this 12-inch beveled wood ruler. The ruler features a brass beveled edge on one side, letting you draw straight and accurate lines, while the wood construction provides the durability necessary for frequent use. This Staples beveled wood ruler has a clear lacquer finish to protect it from splitting and employs an imperial 1/16-inch scale to ensure precise measurement.
bullets: Brown ruler made of selected hardwood with a clear lacquer finish
Imperial 0.06" scale offers accurate measurement
Dimensions: 12"L x 1.2"W
Ruler with brass beveled edge on one side for straight and accurate lines
headliner: Draw straight lines and take accurate measurements with this Staples 12-inch beveled wood ruler.

paragraph: Assemble school projects, crafts, decorations, and more with the non-toxic adhesive of Elmer's Disappearing Purple School Glue. Specially formulated to be easy to use and clean up, Elmer's Disappearing Purple School Glue is purple when first applied so it's easy to see, then it dries clear for great results. Elmer's Disappearing Purple School Glue is washable, photo safe, and non-toxic for fun and easy crafting.
bullets: Goes on purple and dries clear so you can see where you are gluing!
Goes on smooth for easy application
Acid Free, photo safe, non-toxic and washable
Bonds to paper, cardboard, foam board, display board, and more
Perfect for arts, crafts, and school projects
Includes 6, 22g glue sticks
headliner: Mount photos safely with this 2-pack of Elmer's School glue sticks.
expandedDescr: Purple on contact yet drying clear, Elmer’s Disappearing Purple School Glue Sticks help you see exactly where you’re sticking your charts, pictures and more! The glue stick applies smoothly with a disappearing purple formula, making it perfect for kids just learning how to glue. Add on its non-toxic, acid-free formula and you can see why it’s the ideal adhesive for classrooms, homes and youngsters.

dummyKey.title: Evian Natural Spring Water, 33.8 oz., 12 Bottles/Pack (EVI10000)

paragraph: This personal sized bottle of Evian natural spring water is ideal for instant refreshment anytime, the perfect size to slip in your backpack, bag or purse. Our natural spring water from the French Alps has a balanced mineral composition and naturally occurring electrolytes that give it a distinctive, smooth taste that's refreshing, rehydrating & delicious either cold or at room temperature. Evian's commitment to quality ensures that you enjoy natural hydration with every sip. The recyclable plastic bottles are designed for convenience, making it easy to stay refreshed on the go.
bullets: All natural hydration
Natural electrolytes
Crafted by nature
headliner: Experience the pure, refreshing taste of Evian Natural Spring Water.

paragraph: Write easy-to-read notes with these Dixon Ticonderoga wood-case #2 soft, yellow-barrel pencils. These pencils are sold in a pack of 24, which is ideal for busy offices and classrooms, and the solid graphite core delivers a smooth performance and easy-to-read text. These Dixon Ticonderoga wood-case pencils have a latex-free eraser to make it easy to correct mistakes on paper.
bullets: High-quality wooden pencils
This pencil has No. 2 lead that resists breakage for smooth writing
This smooth-writing quality pencil features the classic yellow hexagonal shape
Features a soft lead for smooth, polished writing
Pencils come in pack of 24 and can replace pens during many common work-related tasks or projects
Top-quality, latex-free eraser provides easy, clean corrections
headliner: Sketch and jot down notes with accuracy with this 24-pack of Dixon Ticonderoga wood-case #2 soft yellow-barrel pencils.
